== Code Blocks

Here is a source code block:

[source,python]
----
def factorial(n):
    if n <= 1:
        return 1
    return n * factorial(n-1)

result = factorial(5)
print(f"Factorial: {result}")
----

Another code block in Rust:

[source,rust]
----
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, RuddyDoc!");
}
----
